title: Puerto Banus Luxury Yacht Rental Weekend: Costs and Tips for 2026
html:
A weekend on a luxury yacht in Puerto Banus, departing from the marina at the heart of the Costa del Sol, typically costs from €4,000 to €15,000 for a 48-hour charter including crew and fuel. BoatHire24 lets you compare and book the finest crewed motor yachts and catamarans.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

Marbella's Puerto Banus marina is the main departure point for luxury charters. Other bases include the Real Club Náutico de Marbella, Cabopino Marina in Mijas Costa, and Estepona Marina. Sotogrande, 35 nautical miles southwest, is another option for longer weekends. The Bay of Marbella and the coastline toward Fuengirola offer sheltered cruising grounds.

Which boat to rent for a luxury weekend

For a weekend charter, consider the following boat types.

  1. Motor yacht (15-30m) Best for cruising the Costa del Sol with up to 12 guests, from €12,000 for 48 hours.
  2. Catamaran (40-50ft) Ideal for a social party with up to 14 guests, from €5,000 for two days.
  3. Sports cruiser (10-15m) Perfect for a fast day trip to Marbella or Fuengirola with up to 8 guests, from €2,500 per day.
  4. Crewed sailing yacht (14-20m) Offers serene sailing along the coast for up to 10 guests, from €6,000 for the weekend.

When browsing options on BoatHire24, you can view detailed specs and compare prices. For example, the Mefasa 90 charter page shows a 27-metre Azimut-style motor yacht with four cabins and a crew of three, perfect for a weekend escape. Other models like Sunseeker and Lagoon are also available.

How much does it cost to rent a luxury yacht in Puerto Banus for a weekend?

Prices range from €2,500 for a small motorboat half-day to over €15,000 for a 48-hour crewed yacht. Here is a typical breakdown in EUR:

  • Shared group tour on a rigid inflatable or small motorboat: €80-150 per person (half-day)
  • Small motorboat (up to 8 guests, half-day from Puerto Banus): €600-1,200
  • Catamaran full-day charter (up to 14 guests, including lunch): €1,800-3,500
  • Crewed luxury motor yacht (48-hour weekend, with captain and crew): €8,000-15,000

These figures include fuel and basic crew gratuities; check the operator for final details. You can browse verified options on day charters in Puerto Banus to secure your preferred vessel.

What is the best season for a yacht charter in Puerto Banus?

The peak season runs from May to October, with July and August being the busiest months. The local wind, the Poniente, often blows from Gibraltar and can pick up to 20 knots in the afternoon, especially in summer. Easter and October offer quieter cruising with lighter crowds, though many yachts are available year-round. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Puerto Banus or list your own. Bookings for 2026 are already open for the peak months.

In high season, book your weekend charter at least three months ahead; May and September offer the best balance of calm seas and availability along the Marbella coastline.

Do you need a licence to rent a luxury yacht in Puerto Banus?

For crewed charters, no personal licence is required; the captain holds all necessary certifications. If you plan to rent a bareboat motorboat without a crew, you need a recreational boating licence recognised in Spanish waters (e.g. ICC or Spanish PER). The operator on BoatHire24 will confirm exact requirements for your chosen vessel before booking.

At a glance

  • Price band: €2,500, €15,000 for a weekend charter
  • Peak months: May to October
  • Trip length: Half-day, full day, or 48-hour weekend
  • Capacity: Up to 14 guests on most catamarans; up to 12 on motor yachts
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

Can I rent a yacht for a weekend with a group of 12?

Yes, many yachts in Puerto Banus, such as the 27-metre Mefasa 90, accommodate 10-12 guests overnight with crew.

What is the cancellation policy for a luxury charter?

Typically, cancellations made more than 30 days before departure receive a full refund, though policies vary by operator on BoatHire24.

Are food and drinks included in the weekend price?

Most crewed charters include a welcome drink and lunch, but bar packages or full catering are usually quoted separately.

Is it safe to charter a yacht in Puerto Banus?

Yes, all boats listed on BoatHire24 are verified with insurance and licensed captains, ensuring a safe experience in the Marbella area.

To arrange your luxury weekend, explore the wide range of motor yachts and catamarans available on the BoatHire24 marketplace, or if you own a vessel, list your boat in Puerto Banus to reach thousands of guests planning their 2026 holidays.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
